{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shattersight
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shattersight]] is a bow that looks like it was made from purple mist and rainbows.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shattersight]] is a bow that allows the user to imagine the process of nocking and aiming in less time than doing it.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shattersight]] is a weapon with the ability to break apart existence.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
